7818.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension adding expiration mechanism for time-limited tokens.
7818.notes: FIFO transfer order recommended. Uses epochs (block-based or time-based) for lazy expiration tracking. Consider L2 timestamp security concerns.

7820.one_line_summary: Centralized registry for role-based access control across multiple contracts.
7820.notes: Enables bulk role grants/revocations. Reduces redundancy vs. bespoke implementations. Admin-only state modifications.

7821.one_line_summary: Minimal batch executor interface for EIP-7702 delegations and atomic call batching.
7821.notes: Supports single batch and batch-of-batches modes with optional opData. Designed for maximal simplicity and interoperability.

7827.one_line_summary: Smart contract interface for managing JSON objects with per-key version history.
7827.notes: REST-like interface targeting web2 developers. Gas-heavy on-chain JSON encoding. Recommend client-side efficiency.

7828.one_line_summary: Human-readable chain-specific addresses combining ENS with CAIP-350 identifiers.
7828.notes: Maps chain labels via on.eth ENS namespace. Supports non-EVM chains. Optional checksums for integrity.

7829.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension for data asset NFTs with storage proof and multi-reader support.
7829.notes: Uses modular data availability layer. Optimistic proof approach for gas efficiency. Supports KZG commitments.

7831.one_line_summary: Multi-chain addressing via chain-specific format resolved using ENS on any root chain.
7831.notes: Modified ERC-55 checksum wrapping. Separate bridge contracts per chain. Supports arbitrary address lengths.

7832.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension enabling economically sustainable collaborative collections with dynamic fees.
7832.notes: Progressive discount cycles via logarithmic fee reduction. Donation-based engagement model. 720-hour update interval.

7836.one_line_summary: JSON-RPC methods for application-signed call preparation before wallet execution.
7836.notes: Complements EIP-5792 wallet_sendCalls. Supports session keys and scoped permissions. Multiple key types (secp256k1, p256, WebAuthn).

7837.one_line_summary: Fungible tokens that mint new tokens on transfer with per-token native currency fee.
7837.notes: Interface-compatible with ERC-20 but behaviorally distinct. Sender balance never reduced. Max supply cap.

7841.one_line_summary: Standardized mailbox API and message format for cross-chain communication across L2s.
7841.notes: Supports both synchronous and asynchronous messaging. VM-agnostic with bytes32 addresses. Modular settlement logic.

7845.one_line_summary: Universal data model for orchestrator request/response using JSON-RPC with chain abstraction.
7845.notes: Prefers chain abstraction by default. Flexible action types (transfer, swap, call). Non-technical terminology for broader adoption.

7846.one_line_summary: JSON-RPC method for wallet connection with modular capability support including SIWE.
7846.notes: Complements EIP-5792. Enables combined connection and authentication in single step. Multiple account support.

7847.one_line_summary: Standardized NFT format for decentralized social media posts adapting Nostr protocol.
7847.notes: Uses Schnorr signatures on secp256k1. Supports kind-based event types (0: metadata, 1: content, 6: repost). Compatible with ERC-721/1155.

7856.one_line_summary: URI scheme for chain-specific payment requests using CAIP-10 identifiers.
7856.notes: Format: cspr://recipient/amount/token-address. Supports native currency and ERC-20. Optional callback URLs.
